arts.ttl: Real Madrid tipped to launch summer move for Chelsea star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have this weekend been credited with an interest in the signature of a member of the midfield ranks at Chelsea. The info comes courtesy of…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star a doubt to face Rayo Vallecano after missing training
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid played no part in training alongside the rest of the club’s squad on Saturday. The player in…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Rayo Vallecano - La Liga
arts.sum: How Real Madrid could line up against Rayo Vallecano in La Liga on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'eyeing £17m deal' for William Saliba alternative
arts.sum: Real Madrid allegedly up their interest in Valencia defender Yarek Gasiorowski, who has also been linked with Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti provides Federico Valverde injury update before Real Madrid vs Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an update on the wellbeing of midfield standout Federico Valverde. Valverde, for his part, of course, marked his return to action in…

arts.ttl: Revealed: Real Madrid 'could still pay transfer fee to Liverpool for Trent Alexander-Arnold' - despite the full back's Anfield contract expiring this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are ready to pay a fee to get their hands on Trent Alexander-Arnold before his contract expires with Liverpool on June 30, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Rayo Vallecano: Los Blancos star 'a major doubt' for La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Antonio Rudiger is allegedly a major doubt for Sunday's La Liga clash with Rayo Vallecano due to illness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Enzo Fernandez losses cut as Real Madrid launch big-money move
arts.sum: Real Madrid have Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez on their radar, with the Blues having already named their price for the World Cup-winning midfielder should he leave in the summer. Like Camavinga, he is capable of playing a multitude of different roles and this season he has shone as one of the top-performing central midfielders in the Premier League, according to analysis from SciSports.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer huge injury scare ahead of Atletico Madrid second leg
arts.sum: The availability of Antonio Rudiger is a major concern for Real Madrid ahead of their Champions League tie with Atletico.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Mbappé can't always be at his best
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has defended Kylian Mbappé's form after the star forward disappointed in Real Madrid's 2-1 Champions League win over Atlético Madrid in midweek, saying the France captain's form will waver over the course of a season.
